category_sources: source_facts.description says split input and feed it into the given utility; official GitHub README describes xpipe as reading stdin, splitting it by bytes, lines, or pattern, and invoking a utility repeatedly.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xpipe; official GitHub repository and README use xpipe.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Netmeister app page; official GitHub README includes usage examples and an embedded manual page.
repo_sources: official GitHub repository jschauma/xpipe contains the project README and source; README history identifies Jan Schaumann of netmeister.org as author, matching the official homepage domain.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names splitting input and feeding a utility; official README compares xpipe to split, tee, and xargs and documents stdin chunking.
